# Basic raft interactions: elections, proposals, replication, leader transitions.
# The witness vote is dropped throughout — witness interactions belong in
# scenario/.

add-voters
v1: [a1]
v2: [a1 b2]
----
v1: [a1] term=a cfg=(v1 v2 w)
v2: [a1 b2] term=b cfg=(v1 v2 w)

# v2 campaigns. Its log is more up-to-date, everyone votes yes.
campaign v2 drop=(w)
----
v2 campaigns at term c
v2: yes (self)
v1: yes
w:  (dropped)
outcome: won

# Propose and replicate. Both voters have the entries, quorum reached.
propose v2
----
v1: [a1] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w)
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w) leader

append v2
----
v2 appends through c4
v1: ok
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w)
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=c cfg=(v1 v2 w) committed=c4 leader

# Leader transition: v1 campaigns. Logs match, all yes.
campaign v1 drop=(w)
----
v1 campaigns at term d
v1: yes (self)
v2: yes
w:  (dropped)
outcome: won

propose v1
----
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4 d5 d6] term=d cfg=(v1 v2 w) leader
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4] term=d cfg=(v1 v2 w)

append v1
----
v1 appends through d6
v2: ok
v1: [a1 b2 c3 c4 d5 d6] term=d cfg=(v1 v2 w) committed=d6 leader
v2: [a1 b2 c3 c4 d5 d6] term=d cfg=(v1 v2 w)
